title: Best Orthopaedic & Shoulder Specialist in Bangalore
heading: Effective, Easy Treatments to Relieve Your Shoulder Pain
description: Expert orthopaedic & shoulder care in Bangalore by Dr. Banarji B.H – arthroscopy, joint treatments & sports injury solutions. Book your consultation today.

arthritis results from a gradual tear and wear to the cartilage in your shoulder joints over time. The patients find difficulty in moving… Read more > Shoulder Impingement Shoulder impingement happens when the top of your shoulder blade rubs against your rotator cuff. It creates unnecessary.. However, it can also appear along the tendons of feet… Read more > Wrist Arthritis The risk of wrist arthritis increases in people with their ageing. This is a serious health issue that causes pain and swelling in wrist… Read more > Dr. Banarji B H Orthopaedic Surgeon Dr Banarji B.H is acclaimed as the Best Orthopaedic Surgeon Specialised in the field of Arthroscopy and sports medicine, He is expertised in Shoulder and Upper limb disorders & He is one of the eminent, distinguished and most sought after shoulder specialist in Bangalore. He is one of the pioneers in the field of Shoulder Arthroscopy and upper limb reconstructive surgeries ,He is one among the few surgeons who introduced key hole surgeries of shoulder and elbow joint in the state of Karnataka and has performed maximum numbers of keyhole surgeries of shoulder, knee and elbow joints. He is a leading Shoulder Specialist In Bangalore. He has done his M.B.B.S – from Govt Medical College (now VIMS), Bellary in July 1998. M.S. Orthopedics, from M.R. Medical College, Gulbarga affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Bangalore in April 2005 Facebook YouTube Pinterest LinkedIn Instagram WhatsApp ARTHROSCOPY Shoulder Arthroscopy Shoulder Replacement Elbow Arthroscopy Elbow Replacement Wrist Arthroscopy Shoulder Arthroscopy Shoulder Arthroscopy surgery is a minimally invasive surgery that helps you get rid of many shoulder problems like rotator cuff tears, frozen shoulder, and shoulder impingement. This surgery is performed using general anesthesia that will put the patient to sleep for some hours. It only requires small incisions that are about the size of a keyhole. Shoulder Arthroscopy for Rotator Cuff Surgery Shoulder Arthroscopy for Frozen Shoulder Shoulder Arthroscopy for Shoulder Impingement Read More Shoulder Replacement Shoulder replacement surgery or shoulder arthroplasty is an increasingly common surgical procedure. It is effective in easing pain and improving shoulder functions, shoulder arthroplasty is of 3 types Total Shoulder Replacement Surgery Reverse Shoulder Replacement Surgery Hemi-Shoulder Replacement Read More Elbow Arthroscopy The surgeon performs it with minimal surgical instruments and minimal incisions to treat painful tissues inside or around your elbow. First off, general anaesthesia is given to put the patient to sleep for a limited time period. Then, an arthroscope (tiny camera) is inserted through small incisions to view the internal images on the computer screen. Elbow Arthroscopy for Tennis Elbow Release Elbow Arthroscopy for Early Elbow Arthritis Elbow Arthroscopy for Elbow Synovectomy Read More Elbow Replacement Shoulder replacement surgery or shoulder arthroplasty is an increasingly common surgical procedure. It is effective in easing pain and improving shoulder functions, shoulder arthroplasty is of 3 types Read More Wrist Arthroscopy Wrist arthroscopy is a surgical procedure that uses a tiny camera measuring 1.9 mm to analyze the damages or defects inside or around wrists. Based on the internal images of the camera, Dr Banarji BH, inspects tissues including tendons, ligaments, bones, and cartilage.
